blocks.text: Match preview: Estonia face Norway in 6th Match (T20) on Thu, 9 Jul, 2026, 6:00 pm at Koge Cricket Club Koge. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

rows: ICC Men's T20 World Cup Europe Sub Regional Qualifier B

blocks.text: Standard T20 surface expected. Conditions will be clearer at the toss — monitor team selection and dew factor for night games.
Expected par score: 160–180 runs par score.
Overcast · High 26°C / Low 13°C · Rain: 0 mm · Wind: up to 16 km/h. Cloud cover expected — seamers may get movement with the new ball.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
